description: Manual evaluation checklist for TinyFish flow-scout MVP. After each run, open artifacts/.../flows.json and per-scout JSON files; mark each expected_flow as found, missed, or wrong (false positive).

sites.notes: Stable public site; good for sanity checks on nav and language flows.

expected_flows.name: Pick a language / enter a wiki
Foundation / donate if linked from portal

sites.notes: Docs-heavy IA; tests discovery of learn/reference/support-style flows without payments.

expected_flows.name: API reference or equivalent top-level docs entry

sites.notes: Minimal page; expect very few flows — useful for false-positive checks.

expected_flows.name: Learn more / spec link if present

stability_protocol: Run the same --url and --scouts twice the same day; compare flows.json merge_count and flow names. Large drift suggests flaky indexing.
